sentences.text: Hi Ben, how are you running things today?
I'm Ben, and I run Ben's Electric Solutions. I have 30 years in the trade. I handle residential, commercial jobs, service calls, and projects.
I do mostly. I need an AI virtual receptionist 24/7 to qualify jobs and schedule. I use Jobber CRM. If there is an emergency after hours, call me personally because I am on call.
